summary: Iter208 — Tested P3 features (batch history dialog + branch-request suggestion relink + WAC snapshot on produce). Backend: 8/8 tests pass including all error paths for relink (400/404). UI: Batch History dialog (التصنيع tab) verified visually — opens via batch-history-btn-{id}, shows correct summary (count=3, qty=102 حبة, wac=78 IQD), 3 batch rows with correct data, close button works. UI: branch-req-suggestion button NOT verified in UI because the radix tab 'طلبات الفروع' (tab-branch-requests) would not become aria-selected via Playwright click (force, mouse, evaluate all tried). Tab content remained on المخزن. Manufacturing tab works fine via same selectors — this is a localized radix/click issue. Backend relink endpoint is fully verified end-to-end, so the relink integration is functionally correct; only the in-browser click path could not be automated.

integration_issues.issue: Clicking [data-testid="tab-branch-requests"] (radix TabsTrigger) does not switch panel — aria-selected stays false. Other tabs (tab-manufacturing, tab-warehouse) work fine via the same approach. Likely a stacking/overlay issue around the unread-count badge '2' that overlaps the tab trigger and intercepts the click. Main agent should verify in real browser; if reproducible, increase badge pointer-events:none.

action_items: Main agent: visually confirm in real browser that clicking the 'طلبات الفروع' tab pill works and the suggestion button (data-testid=branch-req-suggestion-{requestId}-{idx}) is clickable; if a notification badge overlays the trigger, add pointer-events-none to the badge.
Optional: split routes/inventory_system.py (7050 LOC) and WarehouseManufacturing.js (~6000+ LOC) into smaller modules per code-review guideline (>700 lines).
critical_code_review_comments: routes/inventory_system.py is ~7050 lines — well over the 700-line guideline. Recommend modular split.
Relink endpoint correctly returns 400 for missing product_id and out-of-range item_index, 404 for unknown request/product — clean error handling.
get_product_batches endpoint correctly computes summary aggregates and surfaces wac_unit_after snapshot; null is returned for legacy rows (expected).
produce_product correctly persists wac_unit_after and batch_unit_cost_after in movement (verified).

success_rate.frontend: 67% (batch-history dialog verified; suggestion-relink UI click blocked by tab-switch issue in automation)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded product 17918d1e-be86-4d1e-9ac6-8d5440d97161 'برغر اختبار' (3 batches). Synthetic branch_request REL-TEST-UI inserted via mongo for relink tests; cleaned up at end.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend P3 features fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_p3_batches_relink_iter100.py (8 tests). UI: batch history dialog verified working in real browser. UI relink click is a known automation limitation — the radix Tabs trigger 'tab-branch-requests' doesn't activate in headless playwright (other tabs do). When retesting, ask main agent to confirm the unread-badge isn't intercepting pointer events. Backend endpoint correctness is unaffected.
rca of the issue: tab-branch-requests click does not switch tab in playwright. Hypothesis: the notification badge (red '2') is rendered with absolute positioning over the TabsTrigger and intercepts pointer events; radix sees the click on the badge, not the trigger, so it doesn't activate. Mitigation in code: add 'pointer-events-none' class to the badge span, or wrap the TabsTrigger label inside a span and position the badge with pointer-events:none.
